text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
223 
LINE_PRCSG_IND_CD 
LABEL: 
Line Processing Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code on a non-institutional claim indicating to whom payment was made or if the claim was 
denied. 
SHORT NAME: PRCNGIND 
LONG NAME: LINE_PRCSG_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
A = Allowed 
B = Benefits exhausted 
C = Non-covered care 
D = Denied (from BMAD) 
G = MSP cost
